_meta.bundle: Property Documents — Appraisal (Form 1004) + Title Commitment + Hazard Insurance Declaration
_meta.subject_property: 3625 Crow Canyon Rd, Unit 408, Castro Valley CA 94552
_meta.purpose: Lender lends against the PROPERTY, not just the borrower. These three documents establish (a) the property is worth what it sells for, (b) the seller can convey clean title, (c) the property will be insured against loss.

appraisal_form_1004.form: Uniform Residential Appraisal Report (Form 1004 / Freddie Mac 70)

subject_property.quality: Q3 — Quality construction with good materials

comparable_sales.notes: Lower floor, similar interior — minor view adjustment
Slightly larger, higher floor — bracketed adjustment
Smaller, dated kitchen — positive adjustment for subject's renovations

appraisal_form_1004.appraiser_certification: I certify that the appraised value is supported by recent comparable sales and reasonable market analysis. Property is in acceptable condition for lending.

lender_review.review_appraiser: Internal QC — DobbyBank Appraisal Review Desk

title_commitment.form: Title Commitment (ALTA Commitment for Title Insurance)
title_commitment.title_company: Old Republic National Title Insurance Co
title_commitment.proposed_insured: Maria Lucia Rodriguez, an unmarried woman
schedule_a_requirements: Recording of executed Grant Deed from Patel Family Trust to Maria L. Rodriguez
Recording of executed Deed of Trust securing DobbyBank loan of $750,000
Payment of 2025-2026 second-half property tax installment (currently delinquent? NO — paid)
Recording of HOA assignment / payoff of any existing liens

schedule_b_exceptions.description: Master Declaration of Covenants for Crow Canyon HOA, recorded 2018-09-15, Document #2018-187432
HOA has lien rights for unpaid assessments per CC&Rs
PG&E utility easement along eastern property line — standard

title_commitment.title_status: Clear of derogatory liens. All Schedule A requirements satisfiable at close.

hazard_insurance_declaration.form: Evidence of Insurance — HO-6 (Condominium Unit-Owners Policy)
hazard_insurance_declaration.coverage_a_notes: HO-6 policy — the HOA's master policy covers the building shell. Unit owner's policy covers improvements/betterments and personal property.
hazard_insurance_declaration.deductible_earthquake: Excluded — California earthquake endorsement not added (borrower election)
hazard_insurance_declaration.notes: HO-6 minimums met. Master HOA policy reviewed separately — confirmed walls-in coverage adequate for first-mortgage.
